zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Giffard於大約1240年出生在英國越可爾波頓時，她的父親Hugh de Gifford47歲，母親Sybil de Cormeilles49歲。她和Walter De Mandeville至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1308年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Giffard于大约1240年出生在英国越可爾波頓时，她的父亲Hugh de Gifford47岁，母亲Sybil de Cormeilles49岁。她和Walter De Mandeville至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1308年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Giffard was born about 1240, in Boynton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Hugh de Gifford, was 47 and her mother, Sybil de Cormeilles, was 49. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Walter De Mandeville. She died about 1308, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Giffard est née environ 1240, à Boynton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Gifford, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Cormeilles, avait 49 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Walter De Mandeville. Elle est décédée environ 1308, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Giffard um 1240 in Boynton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Gifford 47 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Cormeilles 49. Sie hatte mit Walter De Mandeville mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1308 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Giffard è nata il circa 1240 nel Boynton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Gifford, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Cormeilles, aveva 49 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Walter De Mandeville. Morì circa 1308, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Giffardが約1240年にイギリスヨークシュアイアボイントンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Giffordは47歳，母Sybil de Cormeillesは49歳であった。彼女はWalter De Mandevilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1308年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Giffard(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 요르크실르 보이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Gifford(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Cormeilles(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 Walter De Mandeville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1308년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Giffard nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Boynton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Gifford, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Cormeilles, tinha 49 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Walter De Mandeville. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1308, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Giffard родилась около 1240 г. в местности боинтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Gifford было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Cormeilles, 49. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Walter De Mandeville. Она умерла около 1308 г. в возрасте 70 лет.
